metadata.name: geospatial_interventions_dataset
metadata.description: Synthetic geospatial dataset for technical assessment. Includes point interventions, timestamps, attributes, and sample polygons for within-area queries.

sample_queries: Which interventions happened within 5km of 20.700,-103.320 during March 2026?
How many interventions are inside zone_c?
Show validated interventions in proj_02 near the central polygon.
